name: Black Hole
description: The Black Hole is a legendary Maliwan shield. When it breaks completely, it generates a powerful singularity that yanks nearby enemies towards you, then follows up with a shock nova. It is best used to disrupt crowds, drag targets out of cover, and set up quick Second Winds.
notes:
Its effect only activates on a full shield break. The ensuing shock nova can hit extremely hard, making it excellent for mobbing.

It can roll the Grounded prefix via a Maliwan capacitor (shock immunity), but cannot spawn with other elemental immunities.

Notable synergies include Gaige, Krieg and Maya. In TPS, the Doppelganger can pass it to Digi-Jacks for area control, though despawning may prevent the nova.

The pull can affect the Cara-Van, and triggering it point-blank can damage you.

special.description:
On break: spawns a large singularity that drags in nearby enemies, then detonates a shock nova.

Boosts shield capacity and nova damage, but lowers nova radius.
special.title: You are the center of the universe.

abilities: Releases a Shock Nova blast when depleted.
